tickets.title: Design Database Schema for MVP
acceptance_criteria: Schema design complete for sources, documents, incidents, and sections

tickets.title: Implement Database Migrations
acceptance_criteria: Migrations apply from scratch without data loss
Basic queries work

tickets.title: QA Review: DB Migrations
acceptance_criteria: Review migration logic and index coverage

tickets.title: Implement File Upload Ingestion API Endpoint
acceptance_criteria: API receives file, stores raw document locally or in S3
Inserts preliminary row into DB

tickets.title: QA Review: Upload Ingestion API
acceptance_criteria: Reject invalid file types
Verify metadata properly stored

tickets.title: Setup Async Queue Worker Infrastructure
acceptance_criteria: Queue system (like BullMQ/Redis) boots and handles a dummy task

tickets.title: QA Review: Queue Worker Infra
acceptance_criteria: Verify worker can gracefully shutdown without ignoring tasks

tickets.title: Build Minimum Parse & Extract NLP Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Extract raw text from parsed document
Split text into sections (impact, timeline, root cause, mitigation)

tickets.title: QA Review: Parse & Extract NLP Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Ensure NLP package handles malformed text without crashing

tickets.title: Implement Job Status Tracking Architecture
acceptance_criteria: API exposes an endpoint to track queue job status based on id

tickets.title: QA Review: Job Status Architecture
acceptance_criteria: Ensure endpoint responds fast enough and prevents polling DDOS

tickets.title: Build Initial Web App Skeleton and Incident List UI
acceptance_criteria: React/Next.js skeleton renders
Displays list of processed incidents fetching from API

tickets.title: QA Review: Initial Web App
acceptance_criteria: Validate React component lifecycle and network error handling

tickets.title: Develop Incident Detail View UI
acceptance_criteria: UI shows complete timeline and sections of a single incident

tickets.title: QA Review: Incident Detail View
acceptance_criteria: Verify missing sections render null-states cleanly
